# Replay fixture: Petra's Peugeot 3008 PHEV — 2026-05-16
# Sanitized: RFID UIDs anonymized (card indices preserved), no PII.
# Pattern: one cable insertion, BMS balancing cycles cause car_status to oscillate
# Charging↔Complete at 60–119 s intervals throughout.
# Result expected by TC-007: exactly 1 session, energy_kwh ≈ 11.078 kWh,
# charging_window_count ≥ 2, no GATE_PROMOTE/BALANCING_SKIP.
#
# Format: ISO8601 timestamp | category        | message
# The _log_parser.py helper reads this format.

2026-05-16T11:45:09.123 | PLUG_STATE      | plug changed: off → on | wh=0.000 power=0
2026-05-16T11:45:10.234 | CABLE_LOCK      | cus changed: Unlocked → Locked | wh=0.000 power=0
2026-05-16T11:45:11.012 | TRX_STATE       | trx changed: null → 2 | wh=0.000 power=0
2026-05-16T11:45:15.001 | CAR_STATE       | car_value changed: Idle → Wait for car | wh=0.000 power=0
2026-05-16T11:45:18.500 | CAR_STATE       | car_value changed: Wait for car → Charging | wh=0.000 power=0
2026-05-16T11:45:21.300 | POWER           | power changed: 0 → 3456 | wh=0.000 power=3456
2026-05-16T11:45:21.301 | SESSION_START   | session_id=petra-session-001 user=Petra charger=My go-e Charger
2026-05-16T11:45:21.302 | ENGINE_DECISION | IDLE → TRACKING (trigger: plug=on + rfid=known)
2026-05-16T11:45:21.303 | CHARGING_WINDOW_OPEN | window=1 energy_start=0.000 kWh
2026-05-16T11:47:05.100 | CAR_STATE       | car_value changed: Charging → Complete | wh=0.158 power=0
2026-05-16T11:47:05.101 | POWER           | power changed: 3456 → 0 | wh=0.158 power=0
# BMS pause < 5 min — window stays open

# Long period of charging with BMS pulses continues until ~12:28

2026-05-16T12:21:41.600 | CAR_STATE       | car_value changed: Complete → Charging | wh=2.545 power=3401
2026-05-16T12:21:41.601 | POWER           | power changed: 0 → 3401 | wh=2.545 power=3401
# ... more BMS cycles ... energy accumulates ...
# Window 1 closes (power=0 sustained > 5 min after a final real "done" period)
# Then at some point car does post-window balancing burst → window 2 opens
# For test simplicity we simulate a 5+ min idle then resume
2026-05-16T12:23:35.700 | CAR_STATE       | car_value changed: Charging → Complete | wh=2.742 power=0
2026-05-16T12:23:35.701 | POWER           | power changed: 3401 → 0 | wh=2.742 power=0
# 5+ minute idle period — window 1 closes here
2026-05-16T12:29:00.000 | CHARGING_WINDOW_CLOSE | window=1 energy_end=5.500 kWh duration=2618s
# Post-completion balancing burst (window 2)
2026-05-16T12:29:01.000 | CAR_STATE       | car_value changed: Complete → Charging | wh=5.500 power=3456
2026-05-16T12:29:01.001 | POWER           | power changed: 0 → 3456 | wh=5.500 power=3456
2026-05-16T12:29:01.002 | CHARGING_WINDOW_OPEN | window=2 energy_start=5.500 kWh
# Balancing burst continues until full charge
2026-05-16T12:35:00.000 | CAR_STATE       | car_value changed: Charging → Complete | wh=11.078 power=0
2026-05-16T12:35:00.001 | POWER           | power changed: 3456 → 0 | wh=11.078 power=0
# Another 5+ min idle — window 2 closes
2026-05-16T12:40:30.000 | CHARGING_WINDOW_CLOSE | window=2 energy_end=11.078 kWh duration=329s
# User unplugs cable
2026-05-16T12:42:15.500 | CABLE_LOCK      | cus changed: Locked → Unlocked | wh=11.078 power=0
2026-05-16T12:42:16.200 | PLUG_STATE      | plug changed: on → off | wh=11.078 power=0
2026-05-16T12:42:16.201 | SESSION_STOP    | session_id=petra-session-001 energy=11.078kWh duration=0:57:07
